pi_items.source: Sygic GPS Navigation documentation - Quick Settings page (https://www.manula.com/manuals/sygic/sygic-gps-navigation/1/en/topic/quick-settings)

Sygic GPS Navigation documentation - Quick Settings page (https://www.manula.com/manuals/sygic/sygic-gps-navigation/1/en/topic/quick-settings) states 'Compass always on – Enable or disable the display of the Compass.' The options are Enable/Disable, not Always.

Multiple Sygic documentation sources (https://www.manula.com/manuals/sygic/sygic-professional-navigation/27.2/en/topic/compass and task description) confirm the compass is referred to as the 'North indicator'

privileged_info_summary: The task targets the Sygic GPS Navigation app (com.sygic.aura). The compass feature is correctly referred to as the 'North indicator' in official documentation. The actual setting name is 'Compass always on' (not just 'Compass'), and the option to enable this feature is 'Enable' (not 'Always'). The setting is located in Quick Settings and allows users to control whether the compass is constantly visible during navigation.
